title: Software Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Squarepoint is a leading global investment management firm specializing in systematic and quantitative trading strategies. Renowned for its innovative approach to financial markets, Squarepoint combines advanced technology, rigorous research, and data\\-driven decision\\-making to deliver superior investment performance. The company prides itself on fostering a collaborative and dynamic work environment that encourages continuous learning and professional growth. With a strong global presence, Squarepoint is committed to leveraging cutting\\-edge technology and analytics to stay ahead in the competitive financial landscape.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a talented and motivated Software Developer to join our Risk Data Pipelines team at Squarepoint. In this role, you will be instrumental in developing and maintaining core software systems that support our risk management framework and trading operations. Your work will directly impact the accuracy, efficiency, and compliance of our trading activities. You will collaborate closely with trading, quantitative, and technology teams to design scalable solutions that handle complex market data processing, trade ingestion, and analytics. This position offers a unique opportunity to gain comprehensive insights into hedge fund operations, working at the intersection of finance and technology. You will be responsible for delivering high\\-quality, maintainable code, participating in architectural discussions, mentoring colleagues, and supporting critical trading functions.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a strong technical background combined with a solid understanding of financial markets. Candidates should have at least a bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, or a related field. A minimum of four years of professional experience working with Python within the financial industry is required. Excellent communication skills and a team\\-oriented mindset are essential for success in this collaborative environment. Experience with database management systems, particularly SQL, is highly desirable. A good understanding of traded financial instruments such as equities, foreign exchange, credit, or interest rates will be advantageous.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain robust, scalable, and efficient software solutions that support risk management, trade processing, and analytics.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to gather requirements, define system architecture, and select appropriate technologies to meet business needs.
* Implement data ingestion pipelines to normalize and stream trade data from various trading platforms including Bloomberg, Fidessa, and SpiderRock.
* Develop data egress solutions to ensure accurate trade booking and regulatory compliance across third\\-party platforms.
* Create analytical tools and services used by investment and quantitative teams to monitor risk exposure, P\\&L, and capital efficiency.
* Automate trading operations such as options and futures expiry management, trade reconciliation, and position updates to support business growth.
* Participate in code reviews, contribute to architectural discussions, and mentor junior team members to foster technical excellence.
* Provide level 2 support for critical systems, troubleshooting issues, and implementing enhancements as needed.


**Benefits**
 Squarepoint offers a competitive benefits package designed to support the well\\-being and professional development of its employees. This includes comprehensive health insurance plans, retirement savings options, and generous paid time off. Employees have access to ongoing training and development programs to enhance their skills and advance their careers. The company promotes a collaborative work environment with opportunities for cross\\-functional projects and innovation. Additionally, Squarepoint values work\\-life balance and provides flexible working arrangements to accommodate individual needs. Being part of a forward\\-thinking organization, employees will have the chance to work on cutting\\-edge technology and contribute to impactful financial strategies.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Squarepoint is committed to creating an inclusive and diverse workplace. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diverse teams drive innovation and excellence, and we actively seek to foster an environment where all employees can thrive and succeed.

title: Remote Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is one of the world's fastest\\-growing artificial intelligence companies dedicated to accelerating the development and deployment of advanced AI systems. With a focus on pushing the boundaries of machine learning and natural language processing, Turing collaborates with leading industry partners to create innovative solutions that transform how organizations leverage AI technology. The company fosters a dynamic, inclusive, and forward\\-thinking environment where talented professionals can thrive and contribute to groundbreaking projects that shape the future of AI\\-driven software development.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our innovative project focused on building large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets tailored for realistic software engineering problems. This role involves direct hands\\-on involvement in developing, automating, and maintaining complex software environments, as well as contributing to the creation of verifiable software engineering tasks based on public repositories. The ideal candidate will possess a strong background in working with high\\-quality open\\-source repositories, particularly on GitHub, and will be instrumental in advancing our dataset coverage across various programming languages and difficulty levels. This position offers an exciting opportunity to influence the future of AI\\-assisted coding and software engineering research by combining practical software engineering expertise with cutting\\-edge AI evaluation techniques.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 3\\+ years of professional experience in software engineering.
* Proficiency in at least one programming language such as Ruby.
* Strong familiarity with Git for version control and Docker for environment management.
* Experience with setting up, automating, and troubleshooting complex development environments.
* Ability to understand and navigate large, complex codebases effectively.
* Hands\\-on experience with open\\-source projects, including contribution, evaluation, or maintenance.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail in software testing and quality assurance.


**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage issues across trending open\\-source repositories on GitHub, identifying those suitable for LLM evaluation.
* Set up and configure development environments, including Dockerization and automation pipelines to streamline testing processes.
* Assess and improve unit test coverage and quality within various projects.
* Modify, run, and debug codebases locally to evaluate the performance of LLMs in bug\\-fixing and code understanding scenarios.
* Collaborate closely with research teams to design and select repositories and issues that challenge LLM capabilities.
* Lead or mentor junior engineers, fostering teamwork and knowledge sharing within the project.
* Continuously identify opportunities to optimize workflows, automate repetitive tasks, and improve dataset quality.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing offers a fully remote working environment, allowing you to work from anywhere while engaging in cutting\\-edge AI projects. You will have the chance to collaborate with some of the leading minds in the AI industry and contribute to innovative solutions that impact the future of software engineering and AI research. Additionally, you will gain exposure to a diverse range of open\\-source projects, enhance your technical skills, and expand your professional network. Turing also provides flexible work hours with options to commit 20, 30, or 40 hours per week, accommodating different schedules and lifestyles. As a contractor, you will enjoy the flexibility of project\\-based work without the constraints of traditional employment, making it an ideal opportunity for professionals seeking to balance work and personal pursuits.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive work environment. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and welcome applications from individuals of all backgrounds, regardless of race, gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or age. We believe that diverse perspectives foster innovation and are essential to our success. All qualified candidates will receive fair consideration for employment without regard to any protected characteristic. We strive to provide a workplace where everyone feels valued, respected, and empowered to contribute their best.

title: Remote Data Engineer

**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading research accelerator based in San Francisco, California, dedicated to advancing frontier AI research and supporting the deployment of sophisticated AI systems across the globe. As a trusted partner for enterprises, Turing specializes in accelerating research with high\\-quality data, innovative training pipelines, and top\\-tier AI researchers skilled in coding, reasoning, STEM disciplines, multilinguality, multimodality, and autonomous agents.  We are seeking experienced Software Engineers (SWE Bench \\- Data Engineer / Data Science) to join our team and contribute to benchmark\\-driven evaluation projects focused on real\\-world data workflows. The ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in data engineering and data science, capable of working across data preparation, analysis, and model\\-related workflows within complex codebases.
   

  

 This position offers an exciting opportunity to work on challenging data engineering and data science problems, collaborating with research and engineering teams to develop robust evaluation frameworks that push the boundaries of AI performance assessment. Your contributions will directly influence the development and deployment of cutting\\-edge AI models, ensuring they meet high standards of quality, reliability, and reproducibility.
   

  

**Responsibilities**

* Participate in code reviews to uphold high standards of code quality, readability, and maintainability.
* Collaborate closely with researchers and engineers to design complex, real\\-world data engineering and data science tasks that challenge AI systems and improve evaluation metrics.


**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 3\\+ years of professional experience as a Data Engineer, Data Scientist, or Software Engineer with a focus on data workflows.
* Strong proficiency in Python, with extensive experience in data processing and scientific computing.
* Proven experience working with both structured and unstructured data sources.
* Solid understanding of machine learning fundamentals and data science principles.
* Ability to navigate, understand, and modify complex, real\\-world codebases effectively.
* Demonstrated capability to write readable, reusable, and well\\-documented code.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills, particularly in algorithmic and data\\-intensive contexts.
* Excellent communication skills in spoken and written English, with the ability to articulate technical concepts clearly.


**Benefits**
* Opportunity to work remotely from anywhere, providing flexibility and work\\-life balance.

title: Senior Cloud Engineer -Azure, IaC & DevOps (Platform Engineer)- Husky (Guindy, Chennai)
description:
**Job Description**
**Title:** 
 Senior Cloud Engineer \\-Azure, IaC \\& DevOps (Platform Engineer)\\- Husky (Guindy, Chennai)
   

  

**Id:** 
 20852
   

  

**Type:** 
 FullTime
   

  

**Location:** 
 Chennai, India
   

  

 At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\\-of\\-the\\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!
   

  

****Job Description****
 Do you want to build the cloud foundations that every Husky cloud product and solution team depends on?
   

  

 As a Senior Engineer in our Platform Engineering team, you’ll work hands‑on on the Azure cloud platform, developing and evolving Infrastructure‑as‑Code, CI/CD pipelines, and shared platform services that enable teams to deliver software faster, safer, and more consistently. You’ll own complex platform components, ensure reliability, security, and automation, and help keep our cloud foundations robust as they scale.
   

  

 This role is ideal for an experienced engineer who enjoys deep technical work, automation, and solving cross‑cutting platform problems—while collaborating closely with Tech Leads, architects, and product teams, without carrying overall technical direction.
   

  

 If you like building the paved road that others build on, this is where your work has impact across the entire organization.
   

  

****Responsibilities****
**Technical Implementation**
* Understand and implement solutions based on the defined LLD (low level design).
* Own complex implementations at component/module level.
* Ensure correctness, performance, security, and maintainability of delivered solutions.
* Make sound technical decisions within assigned scope, escalating broader design concerns as needed.


**Delivery \\& Execution Excellence**
* Translate approved requirements and designs into working software.
* Break down assigned features into actionable tasks.
* Provide reliable estimates for owned work.
* Deliver high\\-quality increments aligned with sprint goals.
* Proactively resolve technical issues within assigned scope.


**Quality, Standards \\& Engineering Practices**
* Write code that is reliable, readable, and maintainable, and follow the team’s agreed standards and best practices
* Participate in meaningful code reviews.
* Ensure adherence to DoR (Definition of Ready) and DoD (Definition of Done) criteria.
* Identify and address technical debt within owned components/module.


**Incident \\& Operational Support**
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex defects and production issues.
* Contribute to root cause analysis and long\\-term fixes.
* Ensure adequate logging and observability in implemented components.


**Collaboration \\& Mentorship**
* Collaborate closely with Tech Leads, Architects, Product Owners, QA, and Platform teams.
* Support and mentor junior and mid\\-level developers.
* Contribute to continuous improvement within the team.


****Qualifications****
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 5\\+ years in cloud / DevOps / platform engineering, with at least 3\\+ years developing and maintaining IaC and CI/CD foundations for multiple teams (or equivalent demonstrated ownership/impact).
* Strong hands\\-on Azure platform engineering background, with proven ability to design and evolve shared platform capabilities that enable multiple dev/product teams.
* Infrastructure as Code (IaC) lifecycle expertise: able to design, review, and maintain IaC repositories and patterns as a productized capability for others (not “one\\-off scripts”).
* Containerization: Experience designing, deploying, and operating containerized applications using Azure Kubernetes Services, Container Apps, Container Instances.
* CI/CD leadership: demonstrated experience designing and maintaining pipelines (validation, approvals, promotion) and embedding them into the development lifecycle.
* Experience with security automation in the DevSecOps lifecycle (e.g., vulnerability scanning / secrets\\-related automation) as part of the platform pipeline/toolchain.
* Azure DevOps \\& Git workflows: strong practical experience with branching, pull requests, and pipeline\\-based validation/approval gates (e.g., plan/validate then approval then apply).
* Ability to drive developer enablement: build reusable templates/tooling and improve developer experience through automation and standardization.
* Solid understanding of governance and compliance\\-by\\-design for cloud foundations (standards, policies, tagging/naming conventions as guardrails).
* Understanding of compliance and security frameworks and standards, e.g. SOX, ISO 27001\\.
* Understanding of Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) principles.
* Experience operating platforms in production, including Monitoring, alerting, and incident response.
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices.
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team.
* Fluency in English (spoken and written).
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities.


**Assets**
* Experience using AI assisted coding tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot) responsibly, with full accountability for code quality, security, and compliance.
* Practical exposure to monitoring/observability enablement (platform\\-level logging/metrics/tracing patterns and tooling integration).
* Understanding of cloud core (hub) services and platform services that are consumed by product teams (i.e., thinking in reusable building blocks).
* Familiarity with cost optimization / FinOps mechanics as they relate to platform foundations and guardrails.


**Why Husky?**
* Regulated Working Hours: Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work\\-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well\\-being.
* Visible Impact: Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.
* Strategic Influence: Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.
* Empowered Involvement: Take an active role in decision\\-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.
* Valued Contributions: Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.
* Impactful Role: Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.
* Cutting\\-Edge Projects: Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.

title: Desktop support Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Sharp Brains is a leading technology solutions provider dedicated to delivering innovative IT support and services to organizations across various industries. With a focus on excellence and customer satisfaction, we specialize in end\\-user computing, infrastructure management, and digital transformation initiatives. Our team of skilled professionals is committed to ensuring seamless technology operations, enabling our clients to achieve their business objectives efficiently. At Sharp Brains, we foster a collaborative and dynamic work environment that encourages continuous learning and professional growth.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a skilled Deskside Support Engineer (EUC L1\\) to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad, India. The ideal candidate will be responsible for providing comprehensive technical support to end\\-users, ensuring smooth operation of desktop and laptop systems. This role involves troubleshooting hardware and software issues, managing device lifecycle activities, and supporting various end\\-user devices and applications. The position offers an excellent opportunity for professionals looking to develop their skills in a fast\\-paced IT environment, working closely with a team of experts to deliver exceptional service.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess a minimum of a diploma or equivalent in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related fields. Proven experience in desktop support, end\\-user computing, or related roles is preferred. Strong knowledge of Windows operating systems, hardware troubleshooting, and basic MAC device handling is essential. Excellent communication skills in both Hindi and English are required for effective interaction with end\\-users and team members. Familiarity with support tools such as SCCM, Intune, and ServiceNow, along with a good understanding of ITIL practices, will be advantageous. Candidates should demonstrate problem\\-solving abilities, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently and within a team.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 The primary responsibilities of this role include providing end\\-to\\-end technical support for desktop and laptop systems, troubleshooting hardware, software, and connectivity issues to ensure minimal downtime. Handling IMAC activities—Install, Move, Add, Change—and performing break/fix tasks for end\\-user devices are key aspects of the role. Managing the full lifecycle of desktop devices, including configuration, patching, OS imaging, and hardware replacements, is vital to maintaining operational efficiency.
   

  

 Utilizing tools such as SCCM, Intune, and ServiceNow, the engineer will track assets, resolve tickets, and provide remote assistance. Administering software installations, updates, and security patches in accordance with IT policies is essential for maintaining system integrity. The role also involves supporting remote and deskside support for applications like MS Office, Outlook, VPN clients, and other enterprise tools.
   

  

 Ensuring compliance with security protocols, antivirus monitoring, and desktop policy enforcement is a critical aspect of the job. The engineer will provide VIP support and act as the primary onsite contact during critical escalations or outages. Supporting peripheral devices such as printers and scanners, along with routine maintenance, forms part of daily responsibilities. Additionally, assisting with Active Directory tasks, user account management, and maintaining accurate documentation of incidents, hardware inventories, and technical procedures are key duties.
   

  

 The candidate should demonstrate familiarity with Windows OS environments, mobile device support, and basic MAC device handling. Following ITIL practices for incident, problem, and service request management ensures consistent and high\\-quality support delivery.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Sharp Brains, we value our employees and offer a comprehensive benefits package that includes competitive salary packages, opportunities for professional development, and a collaborative work environment. Employees benefit from exposure to diverse technical challenges, training programs, and career growth opportunities. We promote work\\-life balance and provide a supportive atmosphere that encourages innovation and continuous learning. Additionally, our employees enjoy health insurance coverage, paid leaves, and other perks designed to foster a healthy and productive work environment.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Sharp Brains is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to creating an inclusive workplace that values diversity and promotes equal employment opportunities for all applicants and employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. Our hiring process is transparent, fair, and based solely on merit and qualifications. We believe that a diverse workforce enhances our ability to serve our clients effectively and innovate continually.

title: Senior SoD Specialist – S/4HANA & Fiori Authorization
description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.
   

  

 This Position reports to:
   

  

 Manager \\- Global SOD Service
   

  

  

  

  

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 In this role, you will play a key part in managing end\\-to\\-end SAP Authorization, with a focus on
 **S/4HANA and Fiori** 
 . You will be actively involved in
 **User Access Management** 
 ,
 **Fiori app authorization** 
 ,
 **role design** 
 ,
 **risk analysis (SoD)** 
 ,
 **mitigation strategies** 
 , and
 **compliance control activities (e.g. SOX)** 
 . This role requires strong coordination with global teams, internal and external auditors, and key business stakeholders.
   

  

 The work model for the role is
 **Hybrid**
 This role contributes to Global SoD Services globally.
   

  

**You will be mainly accountable for:**
* Designing SAP S/4HANA and Fiori security roles, ensuring alignment with business requirements and compliance needs.
* Act as advisor for managing Fiori Launchpad access, including catalog and group assignments, semantic object mapping, and app role integration.
* Performing SoD risk analysis, proposing appropriate mitigation controls, and ensuring proper documentation.
* Building and maintaining SoD rulesets specifically for Fiori apps, mapping Fiori catalogs and tiles to backend authorization objects and ensuring alignment with business process risks.
* Collaborating with internal and external auditors during audits and assessments; responding to findings and implementing improvements.
* Driving User Access Reviews, performing controls, and continuous improvement in access control processes.
* Providing technical support to end users globally, including troubleshooting complex authorization issues (SU53, STAUTHTRACE, SUIM).
* Leading initiatives related to SAP GRC Access Control, including ruleset update for custom t\\-code and FIORI apps.
* Contributing to policy compliance by supporting Business Controls, ITGC controls, SOX audit processes, and security process documentation.
* Supporting change management by ensuring access impacts are considered in deployments, upgrades, and project rollouts.
* Support other various initiatives by Global SoD Services, Corporate, IS or other stakeholders


**Qualifications for the Role:**
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, Business, or related discipline. (Preferred but not mandatory)
* Strong or adequate understanding of business processes (R2R, P2P, O2C, H2R, TAX, TRE \\& ITGC) to provide best support to businesses.
* Minimum 6–8 years of hands\\-on experience in SAP Security, S/4HANA, and Fiori Authorization.
* Proficient in SAP GRC Access Control (ARM, ARA, BRM), with ability to manage rulesets and mitigation assignments.
* Strong understanding of SAP authorization concepts, role design best practices, and Fiori security architecture.
* Experience in defining and maintaining SoD rulesets for Fiori applications, including mapping frontend catalogs to backend roles and business risks.
* Familiarity with audit frameworks (e.g. SOX, ITGC) and experience supporting internal/external audits.
* Ability to work in a global team environment, including effective communication with geographically distributed teams.
* Certifications such as SAP Security, SAP GRC, CISA, or CISM are considered an added advantage.
* Experience in a multicultural or international work environment is a plus.


**What's in it for you? (Optional)**
**More About Us (Mandatory)**
 Our mission in ABB IS (Information Systems) is to harness the power of information technology to deliver valuable, reliable, and competitive IS services for ABB. If you have strong technical skills, analytical mind, and the drive to help us stay ahead of the competition, you are the one we are looking for.
   

  

 Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. We welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.
   

  

 Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.
   

  

 Recruitment Fraud Warning
   

  

 ABB never asks for payment from job applicants. All genuine job offers follow a formal application and interview process.
   

  

 View current job openings and apply at: https://careers.abb/global/en/home
